title: hieracium sonchoides subsp. richerianum
intro: Hieracium sonchoides subsp. richerianum, also known as Lesser Hawk's Beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in traditional medicine for its bitter and astringent properties, which can help to stimulate digestion and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, potentially providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium sonchoides subsp. richerianum is typically used as a tea or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
